title: A Problem with My Reservation
content: When Emma arrived at her hotel, the receptionist could not find her reservation in the system. Emma showed the confirmation email on her phone, but the booking still appeared to be missing. After checking several times, the staff discovered that a technical error had transferred the reservation to the wrong date. Although the situation was stressful, the employees worked hard to resolve the problem. Fortunately, a room was still available, and Emma checked in without additional charges. The experience reminded her to always keep copies of important travel documents and confirmations.
